payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Partial dark brown wooden cabinet front with two recessed paneled doors and rectangular moldings, matte/worn surface texture and visible top edge and base; crop is edge-cut on the right side and the cabinet appears close to the camera (approximately 0.8 m).
